# LLM documentation for www.dynatrace.com

> Dynatrace is advancing observability for today's digital businesses, helping to transform the complexity of modern digital ecosystems into powerful business assets. By leveraging AI-powered insights, Dynatrace enables organizations to analyze, automate, and innovate faster to drive their business forward.

## Home
- [Dynatrace homepage](https://www.dynatrace.com/)

## Platform
### Overview
> See how our AI-powered observability platform transforms complexity into your greatest asset.

  - [Platform overview](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/)
  - [Dashboards](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/dashboards/)
  - [Notebooks](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/notebooks/)
  - [Alerting](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/alerting/)
  - [Workflows](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/workflows/)
  - [MCP server](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/mcp-server/)

### Dynatrace Solution Areas
- [Infrastructure Observability](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/infrastructure-observability/)
- [Application Observability](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/application-observability/)
- [AI Observability](https://www.dynatrace.com/solutions/ai-observability/)
- [Digital Experience](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/digital-experience/)
- [Log Analytics](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/log-management-analytics/)
- [Application Security](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/application-security/)
- [Threat Observability](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/threat-observability/)
- [Software Delivery](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/software-delivery/)
- [Business Observability](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/business-observability/)

### Dynatrace Core Technologies
- [Dynatrace Intelligence](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/artificial-intelligence/): Precise answers, intelligent automation, and AI recommendations.
- [AutomationEngine](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/automationengine/): Extensible and flexible answer-driven automation.
- [AppEngine](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/appengine/): Easily create custom, compliant, data-driven apps.
- [Grail](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/grail/): Store, unify, and contextually analyze all observability, security, and business data.
- [Smartscape](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/application-topology-discovery/smartscape/): Automatic, real-time topology mapping with context.
- [OpenPipeline](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/openpipeline/): Ingest, process, enrich, contextualize, and persist data from any source at scale.
- [OneAgent](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/oneagent/): Continuous, automatic discovery & observability across your full stack.
- [PurePath](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/purepath/): Distributed tracing and code-level analysis technology.

### Dynatrace Apps, Extensions, and Customization
> Explore the Dynatrace Hub to see how we’re open, extensible, and easily integrate with all major cloud platforms and solutions.

- [Explore the Dynatrace Hub](https://www.dynatrace.com/hub/)
- [Cloud Platforms](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/cloud-monitoring/)
- [Open Ecosystems](https://www.dynatrace.com/platform/open-ecosystem/)
- [Build your own Dynatrace App](https://developer.dynatrace.com/)
- [Custom Solutions](https://www.dynatrace.com/solutions/custom-solutions/)

### Adopt and Grow
- [Training & Certifications](https://www.dynatrace.com/service-support/education-services/): Maximize your potential with role-focused Dynatrace training and certification solutions.

- [Business Insights](https://www.dynatrace.com/services-support/business-insights/): Advanced analytics and performance optimization.
- [ACE Services](https://www.dynatrace.com/services-support/ace-services/): Hands-on partnership to drive adoption, automation, and success.
- [Dynatrace Developer](https://developer.dynatrace.com/): From beginner to experienced, find everything you need to develop Dynatrace® Apps.
- [Partners](https://www.dynatrace.com/partners/): Bringing together industry experts, thought leaders, and hands-on practitioners to create a world class partner network.

- [Documentation](https://docs.dynatrace.com/docs): Learn all you need to know about Dynatrace—getting started, how to deploy, monitor and much more.

- [Dynatrace Hub](https://www.dynatrace.com/hub/): All the supported technologies, integrations, and extensions from Dynatrace and our trusted partners.
